description:
Meetings are expensive. MeetClock makes the cost visible — live, in real time, right on your screen.

Add your meeting participants with their hourly rates, tap Start, and watch the total cost tick up every second as your team's time is spent. When the meeting ends, tap Stop — MeetClock saves the total so you can review it later.

REAL-TIME COST TRACKING
MeetClock calculates the true cost of every meeting the moment it begins. Every participant's hourly rate contributes to a running total that updates every second.

MULTI-CURRENCY SUPPORT
Team members in different countries? No problem. Each participant can have their own currency, and MeetClock converts everything to your meeting's base currency automatically.

PARTICIPANT MANAGEMENT
Build a shared pool of participants — colleagues, contractors, and shared resources — each with their own role and hourly rate. Add or remove them from any meeting in seconds. Human participants can attend multiple concurrent meetings; resources are exclusive.

STATISTICS DASHBOARD
Track patterns over time. Five charts show which meetings cost the most, how long they run, and how costs distribute across your team.

WORKS ACROSS ALL YOUR DEVICES
MeetClock syncs across iPhone, iPad, and Mac via iCloud. Start a meeting on your iPhone, check costs on your iPad, review statistics on your Mac.

DESIGNED FOR ACCESSIBILITY
Full VoiceOver support with WCAG AAA labels and hints throughout. Respects your Reduce Motion setting.

PRIVACY FIRST
No ads. No analytics. No tracking. Your data lives in iCloud — private, encrypted, and under your control.

MeetClock is for team leads, managers, consultants, and anyone who wants to understand what meetings truly cost.
promotionalText: See the real cost of every meeting — live. Add participants, set rates, and watch the total tick up in real time.
whatsNew:
New in 1.1:
• Tab bar — Meetings, Participants, and Statistics in one place
• Statistics dashboard with 5 charts: cost trends, duration, participants
• Live cost ticker in meeting list — updates every second for running meetings
• Localized into 10 languages
• WCAG AAA accessibility throughout
• Restart a stopped meeting without losing participants
